cards.title: Risk Assessment Process
cards.content:
• Agent as the Primary Underwriter
• Physical Hazards vs. Moral Hazards
• Numerical Rating System
• Underwriting Decisions (Loading, Lien, etc.)

cards.title: 1. Field Underwriter (Agent)
cards.content: The agent is the FIRST or PRIMARY underwriter. Only the agent can observe the customer's lifestyle and habits directly.

cards.title: 2. Desk Underwriter
cards.content: The office official who makes the final decision based on all reports (Proposal, MHR, Medical).

cards.title: 3. Physical vs Moral Hazards
cards.content:
Physical: Body/Environment (BP, Diabetes, Mining Job).
Moral: Character/Habits (Hiding illness, excessive drinking, insurance beyond income).

cards.title: 4. Numerical Rating System
cards.content: Developed by Dr. Arthur Hunter. Points are given for risk factors. Standard risk score = 100.

cards.title: Decision Types
cards.content:
• Standard Acceptance: Regular premium.
• Loading: Extra premium for higher risk.
• Lien: Claim is reduced if death occurs early.
• Postpone/Decline: Risk is too high.

sections.title: 🚀 Exam Pro-Tips (Repeated Themes)
items: Numerical Rating Father: Dr. Arthur Hunter.

cards.title: Q2. Condition for reduced claim early on?
